calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73287447 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find data/cases/scotus/73287447 -maxdepth 7 -type f -print | sort && find . -path '*73287447*' -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/scotus/73287447/record/documents/documents.json && wc -l -w -c data/cases/scotus/73287447/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73287447/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73287447/record/documents/questions-presented.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|search.*case|corpus/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); matches.slice(0,50).forEach(x=>text(x.name+" :: "+x.description));

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert petitions|relist|CVSG|Second Circuit|salience band|Term 2024|Term 2023|Term 2022|Term 2025\" metrics/statpack.md | head -160","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,180p' metrics/statpack.md && rg -n 'salience|fee|circuit|Term' metrics/statpack.md | head -200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"term\") and (.term == \"2025\"))' metrics/statpack.json | head -240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);
const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq '.terms' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"fedcourts query\" docs/cli.md | head -40 && sed -n '110,210p' docs/cli.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"nonpurchaser\" \"antitrust standing\"",filed_before:"2026-07-18",num_results:10,fields:["id","caseName","dateFiled","citation","court_citation_string","absolute_url","status","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r.content??[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"priced out\" \"antitrust standing\" -Nexstar",filed_before:"2026-07-18",num_results:10,fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","court_citation_string","absolute_url","status"]}); for (const c of (r.content??[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '235,280p' docs/salience.md && if [ -f metrics/salience.md ]; then sed -n '1,220p' metrics/salience.md; fi","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:11225706,fields:["id","type","author_str","joined_by_str","html_with_citations"]}); for (const c of (r.content??[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /web|browse|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description) && !/courtlistener/.test(x.name)); matches.slice(0,50).forEach(x=>text(x.name+" :: "+x.description));

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n -A24 -B4 'codex-baseline' config .github src | head -120","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":15000}); text(r.output);
